Vesper Labs

Mid Product Designer

LOCATION

San Francisco, CA
(Hybrid - 3 days/week

in office)

TYPE

Full-time

COMPENSATION

$115,000 - $145,000
annually

TECH STACK

Figma

Interaction Design

Design Systems

Prototyping
(Principle/FramerX)

Design Tokens

Cross-functional
Collaboration Tools
(Slack, Linear, Jira)

Usability Testing
Tools (Maze,
UserTesting)

Analytics Tools
(Mixpanel, Segment)

Handoff & Spec
Documentation
(Zeroheight,
Supernotes)

About Vesper Labs: Vesper Labs is a fast-growing
design-tech startup founded in 2020, focused on
building intelligent collaboration platforms
that help product teams work more efficiently.
We partner with mid-to-enterprise organizations
to streamline their design workflows, from
conception to handoff. Our mission is to
eliminate friction in the product design process
and enable designers to focus on what matters
most—creating meaningful user experiences.

Vesper Labs is seeking a talented Mid Product
Designer with 2-5 years of professional
experience to join our design team. You'll play
a key role in designing and iterating on core
product features, collaborating closely with

engineering and product management teams. Your
work will directly impact how thousands of
designers and product teams collaborate daily.
You should have a solid foundation in
interaction design, design systems, and
prototyping, with a strong eye for detail and a

passion for user-centered problem solving.

RESPONSIBILITIES

Design interaction flows and create high-
fidelity prototypes in Figma for new product
features and improvements, collaborating with
product managers to align on requirements

Contribute to and maintain our evolving design
system, ensuring consistency across the
product while documenting components and
patterns for team reuse

Conduct user research sessions and usability
testing to gather feedback on designs; iterate
based on learnings and analytics data

Partner with frontend engineers during handoff
using design-to-code workflows, providing
detailed specs and design tokens to ensure
pixel-perfect implementation

Empowering teams to designscalable digital experiencesthrough intelligentcollaboration tools Participate in design critiques and cross-
functional reviews, giving and receiving
constructive feedback to elevate design
quality across the team

Work with motion design to define micro-
interactions and animation guidelines using
Principle or similar prototyping tools to
enhance user feedback

Contribute to quarterly design initiatives by
scoping features, creating user personas, and
developing wireframes and user journey maps

Document design decisions and create case
studies for internal knowledge sharing and
external portfolio purposes

REQUIREMENTS

2-5 years of professional product design
experience, preferably in B2B SaaS or design
tools

Proficiency in Figma for UI/UX design, with
experience building and scaling design systems

Strong foundation in interaction design
principles and user-centered design
methodology

Experience with prototyping tools (Figma,
Principle, or similar) and translating designs
into interactive prototypes

Demonstrated ability to work effectively in
cross-functional teams, communicating design
rationale to engineers and stakeholders

Portfolio of 3-5 case studies showing end-to-
end design process, from research through
implementation

BONUS POINTS

Experience designing B2B collaboration or
productivity software

Familiarity with design tokens and component
libraries (e.g., Storybook)

Knowledge of CSS basics or design-to-
development handoff practices

Experience with accessibility standards (WCAG)
and inclusive design practices

 BENEFITS

Competitive health, dental, and vision
insurance with 100% premium coverage for
employee

Unlimited PTO with a minimum of 15 days
encouraged annually

Professional development budget of $2,000/year
for courses, conferences, or design tools

Equity package (stock options) for full-time
employees

Free Figma, Adobe Creative Cloud, and other
design tool subscriptions

Casual dress code and flexible work hours
(core hours 10am-3pm PT)

Weekly catered lunches in the office and fully
stocked kitchen with snacks and beverages

Quarterly team offsites and paid time off to
attend design conferences (Adobe MAX, Design
Systems Conf, etc.)

APPLY

To apply, please submit your resume, a brief

cover letter explaining your interest in Vesper
Labs, and a link to your design portfolio
showcasing 2-3 of your best case studies. Send
your application to careers@vesper-labs.com with
the subject line 'Mid Product Designer
Application' or apply via our careers page at

vesper-labs.com/careers. We review applications
on a rolling basis.
